examples: The rules state that samples must be enclosed in two watertight containers.
If she could just establish the time the picture had been taken, Mick would have a watertight alibi.
Only teak matches oak's expansion coefficient and stays watertight.
We have a watertight bulkhead up there and when we opened it, water came pouring out.
The European Commission has said that it is confident the proposals are legally watertight.
